system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Command against Resolve
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You unleash a powerful roar, striking terror into the hearts of your enemies. On a Success you unnerve those who hear your roar, shaking them for a -1 penalty to Parry per Rank of Neigong if they choose to engage you in melee. The roar affects an area of five feet per Rank of Qi. The effect lasts 1 round per Rank of Qi. The roar is exhausting; each use causes you to take a Wound due to internal injury. Cathartic: The power of the roar is greater, causing the normal effects but also doing 2 Wounds to ev eryone who hears it. It also increases to an area of 10 feet per Rank of Qi. This effect causes you to take 2 Wounds due to internal injury.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.directWoundsNote: Cathartic use affects everyone who hears it; the user also takes 2 Wounds due to internal injury.
system.consequenceNote: The roar causes internal injury to the user.
system.catharticEffect: The power of the roar is greater, causing the normal effects but also doing 2 Wounds to ev eryone who hears it. It also increases to an area of 10 feet per Rank of Qi. This effect causes you to take 2 Wounds due to internal injury.
